meaning: n.刺,戳,懒汉,袋子vt.戳,捅,拨开,刺vi.戳,刺,捅,伸出,刺探,闲荡
examples: He gave me a poke in the ribs to wake me up.
John smiled at them and gave Richard a playful poke.
Right yonder's where I saw Injun Joe poke up his candle, Huck!
Simmons favors shares of the technology and drilling providers needed to poke wells in smaller, tougher fields.
The period known today as the Little Ice Age was just starting to poke through.
